methodsAttempted.query: site:fau.de OR site:ili.fau.de FAU ChatGPT generative KI künstliche Intelligenz Studium Prüfung Datenschutz Hochschullehre
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search mostly returned faculty PDFs, library acquisitions, and one institute-level writing guide; these were screened for scope.
Firecrawl search found the central FAU Prüfungen und Prüfungsämter page, which contains a specific section on AI use in exams.
Legacy ILI pages redirected to the FAU Lehre site and returned 404 content, but their navigation exposed current FAU Lehre KI-in-der-Lehre pages.

methodsAttempted.query: FAU Lehre KI in der Lehre navigation and downloads
methodsAttempted.notes: The current FAU Lehre KI Leitlinien page and linked Leitlinien PDF were fetched. Related Regelwerke and FAU-KI-Tools pages were public but stated that they were still under construction.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found current FAU Lehre KI Leitlinien material and the central FAU Prüfungen page. Claims are scoped to guidance, teaching/exam use, transparency, and data-handling language from those central sources. Under-construction pages, moved ILI pages, and an institute-level writing PDF were rejected for insufficient public content or limited scope.

targets.sourceTitle: Leitlinien für Künstliche Intelligenz (KI) in der Lehre an der FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg

stopConditions: Stop after central FAU sources support narrow teaching, exam, transparency, and data-handling claims.
Do not infer binding Satzungscharakter from FAU Lehre guidance because the source expressly denies it.
Do not use institute-level or under-construction pages for university-wide claims.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Leitlinien für Künstliche Intelligenz (KI) in der Lehre an der FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg

artifacts.claimText: FAU describes its AI-in-teaching guidelines as orientation and inspiration and states that they do not have Satzungscharakter; teaching and exam-related rules remain part of the individual study and examination regulations.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: FAU frames generative AI as support for innovative teaching practices that can strengthen didactic value while preserving academic integrity.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: FAU guidance says instructors are responsible for clear AI-use rules in teaching activities, especially exams, and that students must disclose generative AI use according to the relevant course rules.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: FAU guidance tells users to choose AI tools with data-protection compliance and not to enter personal, confidential, copyright-protected, or personal data into AI systems.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: FAU's central exams page states that if AI is not expressly permitted in exams, especially written papers, it is an unauthorized aid and can lead to the exam being failed for deception.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: FAU's AI-in-teaching guidance says examiners must individually determine and announce whether and how AI-supported aids may be used, and students must disclose the aids used.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Die Leitlinien für KI in der Lehre an der FAU haben keinen Satzungscharakter. Lehr- und prüfungsbezogene Regelungen sind Teil der einzelnen Studien- und Prüfungsordnungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: FAU says the AI-in-teaching guidelines do not have statute character, and teaching/exam rules belong to individual study and examination regulations.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: KI ermöglicht neue Lehr- und Lernformate, die sowohl Lehrenden als auch Studierenden erweiterte Möglichkeiten eröffnen. Sie kann interdisziplinäre Zusammenarbeit und eine zukunftsorientierte, vernetzte Lehr- und Lernkultur unterstützen, die die akademische Integrität wahrt und den didaktischen Mehrwert stärkt.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: FAU says AI can support a connected teaching and learning culture that preserves academic integrity and strengthens didactic value.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Lehrende sind verantwortlich für die klare Regelung des KI-Einsatzes in sämtlichen Lehraktivitäten, insbesondere in Prüfungen. Sie müssen für die Prüfungsszenarien in ihren Lehrveranstaltungen verbindliche Vorgaben festlegen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: FAU says instructors are responsible for clear AI-use rules, especially in exams, and must set binding requirements for exam scenarios.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Geben Sie keine personenbezogenen oder vertraulichen Informationen, insbesondere urheberrechtlich geschützte oder personenbezogene Daten, in KI-Systeme ein.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: FAU says not to enter personal or confidential information, especially copyrighted or personal data, into AI systems.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Sofern künstliche Intelligenz nicht ausdrücklich erlaubt ist, stellt sie ein unzulässiges Hilfsmittel. Dies wiederum hat zur Folge, dass die Prüfung wegen Täuschung als nicht bestanden gilt.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: FAU says AI is an unauthorized aid unless expressly permitted, and the exam is failed for deception.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Allgemeine Informationen: Nutzung künstlicher Intelligenz bei Prüfungen
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Prüfende müssen für jede Prüfung individuell festlegen und bekannt geben, ob und in welcher Form (KI-gestützte) Hilfsmittel genutzt werden dürfen, und diese Vorgaben den Studierenden eindeutig kommunizieren. In jedem Fall sind die verwendeten Hilfsmittel von den Studierenden offenzulegen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: FAU says examiners must set and communicate AI-aid rules for each exam, and students must disclose the aids used.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a source-status claim because the official page expressly says the guidelines have no Satzungscharakter.
Approved as guidance-scoped teaching claim; does not present the guidance as binding policy.
Approved because the source directly assigns instructors responsibility for clear rules and says students must disclose AI use according to course rules.
Approved with privacy/data-handling scope from a direct source-language instruction.
Approved because the central exams page directly states the unauthorized-aid rule when AI is not expressly allowed.
Approved as a narrow examiner-responsibility claim supported by FAU Lehre guidance.

artifacts.title: Friedrich-Alexander-Universität Erlangen-Nürnberg AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official FAU sources support a cautious, guidance-scoped profile: FAU has AI-in-teaching guidelines that expressly lack Satzungscharakter, describe responsible and didactically grounded AI use in teaching and exams, require clear course/exam rules and disclosure, warn against entering personal or confidential data into AI systems, and state on the central exams page that AI is an unauthorized aid unless expressly permitted. Under-construction tool/rules pages, a stale ILI page, and an institute-level writing guide were rejected or limited by scope.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claims are not canonical and must not be published as human-reviewed facts without further review.
The FAU Lehre source itself says the AI-in-teaching guidelines have no Satzungscharakter; claims from that source are guidance-scoped.
Under-construction FAU Lehre pages about Regelwerke and FAU-KI-Tools were not used for substantive claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
